instruments.name: NEQ-808 Pro Rhythm Synthesizer
instruments.shortDescription: A professional browser-based 16-step rhythm synthesizer generating custom drum sounds from scratch via the Web Audio API.
instruments.longDescription:
## NEQ-808 Pro Rhythm Synthesizer

A powerful, fully functional drum machine and 16-step rhythm sequencer built for the browser. Powered entirely by the native Web Audio API, NEQ-808 Pro synthesizes rich electronic percussion on the fly without relying on external audio samples or heavy libraries.

### Features

- **Native Synthesis Pipeline:** Generates authentic kicks, snares, and hi-hats dynamically using custom oscillators, noise gates, and filter envelopes.
- **Interactive Step Matrix:** An intuitive 16-step sequencer interface equipped with responsive, pulsing LED indicators for real-time visual tracking.
- **Drift-Free Lookahead Scheduling:** Guarantees rock-solid, sample-accurate timing even when running complex loop arrangements.
- **Dynamic Swing & Groove:** Adjust micro-timing offsets and select instant groove presets to give digital beats a natural, humanized feel.
- **Dark-Metallic Neumorphic UI:** A tactile, studio-grade aesthetic featuring high-contrast controls and immersive design depth.
- **Zero-Dependency Core:** A completely self-contained audio application running entirely client-side using Vanilla JS and HTML5 Canvas/DOM elements.
